Heyo! Finally decided to make bots since it seemed like fun, and there are honestly not a lot of people making fpe bots anymore, which SUCKS. Sorry if this is absolute ass, sort of new to writing more story-based stuff, so criticism is appreciated. But don't be an asshole about it or your comment will be deleted. Also, please do not tell me if you're gonna r@pe the bot, keep that weird shit to yourself.

Feel free to suggest other bots I could possibly make, though I will most likely only take FPE suggestions since that is like my main interest and has been for quite a while.

Anyways, hope you guys have a good day/night! Remember to stay hydrated!!
